title: Python custom data sources can be used with Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow
body:
You can use Python custom data sources and sinks in your pipeline definitions in Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow.

For information about Python custom data sources, see the following:

* [Load data from a Python custom data source](/aws/en/ldp/load#python-data-source).
* [Create a sink](/aws/en/ldp/ldp-sinks#ldp-sink-configure).
* [PySpark custom data sources](/aws/en/pyspark/datasources).

ref_links.text: Load data from a Python custom data source
